Daecheon Nova Materials Co., Ltd. — Internal Legal & Compliance Memo (KR issuer; FSC/FSS context)
Subject: Pre-disclosure controls re virtual asset (DPT) custody pilot with BluePineX Exchange and ESG/climate audit findings; MNPI handling under FSCMA.
As of 30 May, commercial terms for the DPT custody pilot (intro fee 0.15%, exclusivity for Q4, client cap 50 wallets) remain non-public; treat as MNPI and restrict to the insider list “Project Yeoubi”.
Mr. Jae-min Oh, VP Corporate Strategy, requests permission to brief two buy-side investors before KRX disclosure; this would constitute selective disclosure/tipping risk and is prohibited during the blackout window starting 3 June.
The IR draft deck includes climate-transition cost scenarios; until the external assurance is complete, ESG/climate assumptions are non-final and covered by the information barrier between Sustainability and IR.
Dr. Jin-ho Ahn (CISO) reports an unconfirmed cyber incident affecting two test wallet signing modules; incident details and remediation plan are MNPI and must be recorded in the Cyber Insider Log and not shared outside the wall.
HR noted that Ms. Sun-hee Park’s resident-number (주민등록번호: 940515-2374611) was inadvertently attached to the pilot access list; under PIPA, remove and reissue with employee IDs, and confirm deletion across email archives.
Communications with FSC/FSS should be routed through Legal; do not upload to DART until commercial and incident facts are verified and Board sign-off is obtained.
For educational purposes only, next week’s marketing webinar will explain “crypto wallet resilience” and “climate risk scoring” using demo data; no client or issuer MNPI will be presented.
The compliance team has implemented an information barrier between Capital Markets and Product; any wall-crossing for Project Yeoubi requires written approval and addition to the insider list.
IR may respond to general questions, but refrain from commenting on DPT fee rates or emissions targets, and use the prepared Q&A; do not reference the cyber incident until formally disclosed.
Draft term sheet with BluePineX includes a termination-for-breach clause tied to security SLAs; these commercial terms are confidential and must not be emailed to external analysts or prospective clients.
The Sustainability Committee will meet on 6 June; minutes will be classified “internal restricted” and may affect future TCFD-aligned targets; treat as MNPI until KRX filing.
Contact Legal/Compliance via compliance@daenova.internal or ext. 02-710-0042 for approvals, insider list updates, and PIPA incident confirmations.
